calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-06-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for CONTINUANCE of Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
John Lofton, Esq. for Plaintiff: Sheri Sheridan, appearance waived.
Matter was taken off-calendar on Oct. 18, 2005 for no appearance.
Pending the related Small Claims case #812432, since been dismissed on Oct. 18, 2005, matter added to calendar for the purpose of record only.
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Alex McKay, Brenda O'Connor and Chris Galbraith as follows:
Damages $87,970.87
Costs $610.50, for a total of $88,581.37, see Exhibit "A" for breakdown of Damages awarded.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-07-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-21-2005 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Oct-11-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DAMIEN SCHOT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.
APPEARANCES: No appearances on this matter.
RULING: The Court modified its Tentative Ruling - Off Calendar, case settled per Joshua Ridless, Esq., for Defendant and Moving Party. 301/JLW/HE). JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2005 Continued To Dec-02-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-12-2005 Continued To Oct-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
John Lofton, Esq. for Plaintiff: Sheri Sheridan, present, was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---American Express Statements-------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Copy of Checks--------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Invoices--------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Alex McKay, Damien Schot, Brenda O'Connor and Chris Galbraith as follows: TOTAL $87,970.87
Counsel stipulated for the return of the EXHIBITS in open court, and to prepare Proposed Judgment and a Blank Judgment for signature.

Sept. 2, 2005
Proposed and Blank Judgments rec'd in court.

Sept. 12, 2005
Order Setting Rehearing Date & Time signed by Comm. Kaplan.
